Mohamed Boutaba

28 Rue Hocine Noureddine el-Hamma, 16000 Algiers +213 781 59 99 03 boutaba.cs@gmail.com linkedin.com/in/mohamed-boutaba
Profile

Junior Full Stack Developer specialized in JavaScript technologies (MERN Stack). Holding a Bachelor's degree in Information Systems Engineering (taught in English) and an intensive certification from Code213. Proven expertise through the design of a complex business platform at NAFTAL SPA. Master of software architecture, RESTful API design, and database management (PostgreSQL, MongoDB). Passionate about performance optimization and user experience (UX/UI).

Technical Skills

Primary Stack: MERN Stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js)

Databases: PostgreSQL & MySQL

Development: REST API Development, UI design, relational and NoSQL database management

Tools: Git & GitHub

Soft Skills: Teamwork | Autonomy | Tech Watch | Project Management | Collaboration

Languages: Arabic (Native), French (Fluent), English (Intermediate)

Professional Experience
Intern – Full Stack Developer February 2026 – May 2026 (4 months)
NAFTAL SPA, Algiers, Algeria
Project: Development of a Reception Management Platform for the CMS "CHERIF HAMANI" of Naftal.

  • Full Stack Development: Architecture of reactive interfaces with React.js and implementation of server-side business logic with Node.js and Express.js.
  • Databases: Relational schema modeling and data management with PostgreSQL, query optimization for performance.
  • API Design: Creation of RESTful APIs secured for seamless communication between front-end and back-end.
  • Methodologies: Use of Git for versioning and adherence to Software Engineering best practices.
Certifications
Full Stack JavaScript Certification – Full Stack Web Development December 2025 – June 2026
Code213, Algiers
Intensive Full Stack JavaScript training focused on mastering modern web technologies. Acquisition of advanced skills in front-end and back-end development, robust architecture design, and full lifecycle management of web projects.

Curriculum:
  • Introduction to Web Development, HTML5, CSS3 (Layout & Responsive web)
  • Git & GitHub (Advanced Workflows)
  • Algorithms & JavaScript (DOM, ES6+)
  • ReactJS Framework: JSX, Props, State, React Router, Redux, API Consumption
  • Back-end with NodeJS & ExpressJS
  • NoSQL Databases: MongoDB & Mongoose (Entity-relationship)
  • RESTful API Development & Deployment (Hosting)
Final Project (HUBROBE): Development of a complete E-commerce platform including a client site and an admin dashboard. Integration of payment methods, total management via admin interface, and advanced authentication security.
Education
Bachelor's Degree – Information Systems and Software Engineering September 2023 – May 2026
University of Algiers 1 Benyoucef Benkhedda, Algiers
Grade: Good
In-depth academic curriculum focused on complex information systems design, software engineering, and innovative technology solutions development. This training allowed me to acquire a solid foundation in algorithms, system architecture, and large-scale IT project management.

Final Project: Development of a Reception Management Platform for the CMS "CHERIF HAMANI" of Naftal.

Interests
